meaning: n.漂流物,浮舟,漂浮,浮萍,彩车vi.浮动,飘浮,散播,摇摆,漂浮,动摇(计划等)付诸实行vt.使漂浮,容纳,淹没,发行,实行,用水注满
examples: Can you float on your back?
If it's made of wood it will float.
There wasn't enough water to float the ship.
Twitter lets you share those funny little observations that float through your head .
At which point let me float a causal argument for what is going on here.
